state_snapshot.overall_goal: Stabilize the Alice Viewer 2 rendering pipeline (Infinite Reversed-Z, branchless normals) and implement CAD-standard interaction and visualization (AABB Zoom, Wireframe-on-Shaded).
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **Infinite Reversed-Z**: glClipControl, GL_GREATER, glClearDepth(0.0). - **Zero-Heap Mandate**: Alice::LinearArena used for all mesh ingestion; no allocations in draw/update loops. - **Dual-Pass Wireframe**: Zero vertex re-upload; shader uniform override for line color. - **Precision Scaling**: Camera Pan/Zoom speed is distance-dependent (0.1% - 0.5% of distance).
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **Reversed-Z Polarity**: glPolygonOffset(-1.0, -1.0) pushes geometry AWAY from the camera (towards 0.0). - **AABB Logic**: Center and radius computed O(N) to facilitate "Zoom Extents" without metadata reliance. - **Pipeline Status**: Wireframe Pass 2 successfully intercepts GL_TRIANGLES in the primitive batching layer.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `src/AliceViewer.cpp`: Implemented distance-dependent camera update; added Fill/Line dual-pass logic to `PrimitiveBatch::flush`. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Added `AABB` struct; computed bounds for all 3 meshes in `setup()`; implemented `keyPress` ('f') for focus cycling. - `build/bin/AliceViewer.exe`: Verified stable build with LLVM/Ninja.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Architectural Healing: OpenNURBS and Reversed-Z integration. 2. [DONE] CAD Camera Scaling: Distance-dependent Pan/Zoom/Scroll. 3. [DONE] Wireframe-on-Shaded: Dual-pass zero-cost implementation. 4. [DONE] AABB Zoom Extents: Cycling through Terrain/Quad/OSM bounds. 5. [IN PROGRESS] Final Handoff: Awaiting human visual QA of the wireframe aesthetics.
